title: manettia cordifolia var. hassleriana
intro: Manettia cordifolia var. hassleriana, commonly known as the Brazilian firecracker, is a tropical plant species in the Rubiaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in Paraguay, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Manettia cordifolia var. hassleriana include its potential to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are often used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
